text:
Welcome to this hell hole.
I’m Rick, and I’ll be your technician - Lucky you.

Before you wander off and try not to die, you’ll need to head to the storage bay and fetch the materials for your Portal Pass Key.
Bring ’em back, and I’ll get it sorted.

Actually I am gonna tweek something on your module.
It will help you learn to control this dumpster they call a spaceship.
